---
title: "WDI Dashboard (2022)"
format:
  dashboard:
    theme: cosmo
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{python}
import pandas as pd
import plotly.express as px

df = pd.read_csv("wdi.csv")
```

## Controls {.sidebar}

```{python}
import ipywidgets as widgets

country_dropdown = widgets.Dropdown(
    options=sorted(df["country"].dropna().unique()),
    description="Country:"
)

country_dropdown
```

## GDP vs Life Expectancy

```{python}
filtered = df[df["country"] == country_dropdown.value]

fig = px.scatter(
    df,
    x="gdp_per_capita",
    y="life_expectancy",
    hover_name="country",
    title="GDP vs Life Expectancy (2022)"
)
fig
```

## Summary Statistics

```{python}
df[["gdp_per_capita", "life_expectancy"]].describe()
```
